name: Hyperthyroidism
definition: Clinical syndrome caused by excessive thyroid hormone secretion
etiology: Autoimmune disease, genetic factors, mental stress, infection
symptoms: Heat intolerance, sweating, palpitations, increased appetite with weight loss, emotional excitement, bulging eyes
treatment_principles: Inhibit thyroid hormone synthesis, symptomatic treatment, radioactive iodine therapy or surgery
prevention_advice: Avoid mental stress, balanced diet, regular thyroid function review
